ddls:
CREATE TABLE "calls" (
  "call_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call */,
  "unit_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the responding unit */,
  "incident_number" INTEGER /* Unique incident number */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of emergency call */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date the call was received */,
  "watch_date" TEXT /* Date the call was watched or logged */,
  "call_final_disposition" TEXT /* Final disposition of the call */,
  "available_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the call became available for dispatch */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address where the incident occurred */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode of the incident location */,
  "battalion" TEXT /* Battalion responsible for the incident */,
  "station_area" INTEGER /* Station area responsible for the incident */,
  "box" INTEGER /* Box or sector of the incident location */,
  "original_priority" INTEGER /* Original priority assigned to the call */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority assigned to the call after assessment */,
  "final_priority" INTEGER /* Final priority after incident resolution */,
  "als_unit" TEXT /* Indicates if ALS (Advanced Life Support) unit was required */,
  "call_type_group" INTEGER /* Grouping of call types */,
  "num_alarms" TEXT /* Number of alarms triggered for the incident */,
  "unit_type" INTEGER /* Type of unit responding to the call */,
  "unit_sequence_in_call_dispatch" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the unit in call dispatch */,
  "fire_prevention_district" INTEGER /* Fire prevention district of the incident location */,
  "supervisor_district" INTEGER /* Supervisor district of the incident location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the incident occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the incident */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* Unique row identifier for the call record */,
  "delay" REAL /* Delay in response time */,
  "caller_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the caller */,
  "call_source" TEXT /* Source of the call (e.g., 911, mobile app, web form) */,
  "call_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the call in seconds */,
  "call_notes" TEXT /* Notes or additional details provided during the call */,
  "dispatcher_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the dispatcher who handled the call */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the caller is anonymous */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language used during the call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_call_type FOREIGN KEY ("call_type") REFERENCES call_types ("call_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_priority FOREIGN KEY ("priority") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_incident_number FOREIGN KEY ("incident_number") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., TRUCK, ENGINE, MEDIC) */,
  "battalion" TEXT /* Battalion the unit belongs to */,
  "unit_status" TEXT /* Current status of the unit (e.g., available, en route, at scene) */,
  "unit_location" TEXT /* Current geographical location of the unit */,
  "unit_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity or number of personnel the unit can carry */,
  "unit_equipment" TEXT /* List of equipment available on the unit */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_battalion FOREIGN KEY ("battalion") REFERENCES battalions ("battalion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident ended */,
  "final_disposition" TEXT /* Final disposition of the incident */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "incident_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the incident (e.g., electrical fault, human error) */,
  "incident_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the incident (e.g., resolved, ongoing) */,
  "incident_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the incident */,
  "incident_media" TEXT /* Links to any media (e.g., photos, videos) related to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_types" (
  "call_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call type */,
  "call_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the call type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the call type */,
  "is_emergency" INTEGER /* Indicates if the call type is for a true emergency */,
  "call_type_code" TEXT /* Code or abbreviation for the call type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "priority_color" TEXT /* Color code for the priority level (e.g., red for high, yellow for medium) */,
  "priority_response_time" INTEGER /* Expected response time in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battalions" (
  "battalion_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each battalion */,
  "battalion_name" TEXT /* Name of the battalion */,
  "supervisor_district" INTEGER /* Supervisor district the battalion is responsible for */,
  "battalion_commander" TEXT /* Name of the battalion commander */,
  "battalion_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the battalion headquarters */,
  "battalion_resources" TEXT /* List of resources available with the battalion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battalion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "battalion_id" TEXT /* Battalion the station belongs to */,
  "station_area" INTEGER /* Station area responsible for */,
  "station_commander" TEXT /* Name of the station commander */,
  "station_address" TEXT /* Full address of the station */,
  "station_equipment" TEXT /* List of equipment available at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_battalion_id FOREIGN KEY ("battalion_id") REFERENCES battalions ("battalion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "supervisor_district" INTEGER /* Supervisor district the neighborhood is in */,
  "neighborhood_population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_area" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "neighborhood_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the neighborhood (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_supervisor_district FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_district") REFERENCES supervisor_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the fire prevention district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Population of the fire district */,
  "district_area" REAL /* Area of the fire district in square kilometers */,
  "district_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the fire district (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supervisor_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supervisor district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor district */,
  "supervisor_name" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor responsible for the district */,
  "district_population" INTEGER /* Population of the supervisor district */,
  "district_area" REAL /* Area of the supervisor district in square kilometers */,
  "district_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the supervisor district (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "incident_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "unit_id" TEXT /* Reference to the unit responding */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time taken to respond to the call */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time the unit arrived at the incident */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time the unit departed from the incident */,
  "response_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the response */,
  "response_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the response (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "response_media" TEXT /* Links to any media (e.g., photos, videos) related to the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_responses_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_responses_incident_number FOREIGN KEY ("incident_number") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "incident_number" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource used */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_cost" REAL /* Cost of the resource used */,
  "resource_supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the resource */,
  "resource_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the resource (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_resources_incident_number FOREIGN KEY ("incident_number") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_number")
)
